case_title: SUZANNE SCHAEFER HENAFF VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-24-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-09-2025 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOSH M. FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF SUZANNE SCHAEFER HENAFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY D'JON PAUL SCOTT-MILLER, DIRECTOR OF TENAT BASE VOUCHER & SPECIAL PROGRAMS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY HENAFF, SUZANNE SCHAEFER AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENAFF, SUZANNE SCHAEFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY JUDGMENT FOR THE DEFENDAANT VS PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
